id.description: Legacy fills this from the raw record's own 'id' field when present; when absent, legacy derives it as the first non-empty value of bucket, then date, then the literal stream name 'account_stats' (hooks/wasabi-stats-api/hooks.go's RecordHook ports this fallback verbatim). account_stats records have no 'bucket' field, so this effectively falls back to date, then the literal stream name, for this stream.
